历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the science group were approximately 6836, 16014 (including A1 segment), 6961, 16053 (including A1 segment), and 7886 (Physics Category). Excluding outliers from the A1 segment, the rankings over the past three years (2023–2025) have shifted slightly backward by about 925 places, from 6961 to 7886, with a baseline of approximately 7886 in 2025. The provincial science group enrollment plan was 34 in both 2021 and 2022, dropped to 29 in 2023, rebounded to 35 in 2024, and was 34 in 2025 (Physics Category). In 2026, the Physics Category plan is 35, an increase of 1 (+2.9%) compared to 2025, with the slight expansion slightly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shanghai University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 60th, with fluctuations between 43 and 61 in recent years, placing it among the top 60 nationally. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is clearly negative, mainly involving incidents such as dean paper fraud and academic misconduct, which may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. Its Douyin popularity ranks 48th (relatively hot), with moderate attention. There is no history of admission gaps. Sociology (A) and World History (A-) are A- or above in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, directly corresponding to the Humanities Experimental Class (including Sociology, History, etc.) in the enrollment majors, but the science group enrollment majors are mainly engineering/management, with limited coverage of advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electronic Information/Communication and Electrical Engineering are highly recommended popular majors, aligning with the university's Electrical Engineering enrollment direction. Economics is in a state of divergence and observation. Materials (Biochemistry, Environmental, Chemical, Materials) are generally observed to clearly discouraged. In 2026, the province has approximately 167,419 Physics Category candidates, a decrease of about 5,928 (-3.4%) compared to 2025, slightly easing competition pressure. Shanghai University is located in Shanghai, which is a cross-province application for Shanxi candidates, with strong regional appeal. The university's enrollment scale in Shanxi is relatively small.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 7886, slight enrollment expansion in 2026 (+2.9%), negative reputation, and a decrease in Physics Category candidates (-3.4%), the negative reputation factor slightly pushes the ranking higher. The final predicted minimum ranking is approximately 8055, with a range of 7555–8555.

For rankings significantly better than the lower limit (<7555), prioritize reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for the comprehensive category in Beijing were approximately 5719 → 6509 → 7037 → 7342 → 7440, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1721 places over the past 4 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 7440, with the backward shift rate slightly slowing but still rising; the enrollment plan for the comprehensive category in Beijing: 65 in 2021, 126 in 2022, 124 in 2023, 136 in 2024, 148 in 2025, 159 in 2026, with continuous expansion; the 2026 plan is about 7.4% larger than 2025, a significant expansion that somewhat alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Minzu University of China is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science China University Rankings have been rising in recent years: 100th in 2021 → 101st in 2022 → 104th in 2023 → 103rd in 2024 → 80th in 2025 → 79th in 2026, with a significant improvement in ranking, enhancing the university's overall strength and recognition; the school's reputation has been stable in recent years, with no obvious negative public opinion or record of enrollment gaps; the overall Douyin popularity ranking is 80th (rated as "average"), with moderately low exposure on short video platforms, and no abnormal fluctuations in application attention; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Ethnology was rated A+ (top in the country), Chinese Language and Literature A-, Sociology A-, with a total of 3 disciplines rated A- or above; Ethnology is the university's flagship discipline, which has some appeal for applications to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the total number of applicants for the Beijing college entrance examination is about 84,900, a significant increase of about 29.7% compared to 65,434 in 2025, greatly intensifying competition; the surge in the number of candidates is the most critical external factor affecting rankings; Minzu University of China is located in Beijing, a local university, with a relatively high proportion of local enrollment (148 planned in 2025), and local candidates usually have a strong willingness to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the mitigating effect of a 7.4% expansion in 2026, the increased attractiveness due to rising Soft Science rankings, and the strongest competitive driver of a 29.7% surge in the total number of candidates in Beijing, it is judged that the admission ranking in 2026 will continue to shift backward; although expansion partially offsets competition, the increase in candidates far exceeds the expansion rate, and the improvement in school level may attract more high-scoring candidates. The predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is about 7802, a backward shift of about 362 places from 7440 in 2025, with a range of 7302–8302.
